feed.title: Tree Ring Memory Launch Updates
feed.subtitle: Launch updates for the framework-agnostic memory lifecycle layer for AI agents.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory v0.13.0 adds same-host multi-agent guardrails
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory v0.13.0 adds same-host agent, workflow, session, and operation correlation; exact-retry idempotency; and opt-in coordinator authorization for shared writes and lifecycle mutations. Schema v3 fences memory inserts, updates, and deletes from old writers; all mixed-version operation is unsupported. These guarantees cover cooperative processes sharing local SQLite on one host, not distributed storage or a read ACL.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory v0.12.0 workflow-proof preview is live
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory v0.12.0 adds a controlled agent-workflow proof that retains paired workspaces, records the explicit model identity, and validates exact structured decisions. The proof reports only its observed fixture outcomes; it is not a universal memory benchmark.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory submitted to Awesome Command Line Tools
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory was submitted to Awesome Command Line Tools under Shell Utilities as a local-first memory lifecycle CLI for AI agents.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory submitted to Awesome AI SDKs
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory was submitted to the Awesome AI SDKs directory as a framework-agnostic, local-first memory lifecycle layer for AI agents. The PR is open and mergeable, with E2B CLA completion still required.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory submitted to Awesome Local-First
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory was submitted to the Awesome Local-First directory under Frameworks & Platforms as a local-first memory lifecycle framework for AI agents.

entry.title: Homebrew tap opened for Tree Ring Memory
entry.summary: The macOS ARM64 launch-preview artifact can now be installed with brew tap TerminallyLazy/tree-ring and brew install tree-ring.

entry.title: Building a Rust-native memory lifecycle CLI for AI agents
entry.summary: A Rust-focused launch article covering Tree Ring Memory's workspace split, SQLite/FTS storage choice, explicit writes, explainable recall, and Ratatui operator console.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory v0.11.0 launch preview is live
entry.summary: Tree Ring Memory v0.11.0 ships a Rust-native local-first CLI with SQLite/FTS recall, audit, forgetting, consolidation, DOX/Revolve adapters, framework discovery, and a Ratatui terminal console.

entry.title: Launch discussion opened for Tree Ring Memory
entry.summary: Use the launch discussion for feedback on adapter priorities, explainable recall, the ring model, privacy controls, and first-ten-minute install friction.

entry.title: Tree Ring Memory launch page and press kit
entry.summary: The public launch page, press kit, LLM summary, and feedback issue are live for the first campaign wave.
